text:
CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Pioneer — Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) — Beneficiary File V2
Version — May 2025
SAS name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
BENE_ACO_YEAR Year of Beneficiary ACO Source Record NUM 4
ACO_ID ACO Identifier CHAR 4
BIRTH_DT Date of Birth DATE 8
DEATH_DT Date of Death DATE 8
SEX_CD Sex CHAR 1
M01_ALIGN Month 1 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M02_ALIGN Month 2 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M03_ALIGN Month 3 Alignment Flag NUM
